untranslatable_reason: Signal requires put/call ratio from open buy volume, which is an options market microstructure indicator not available in the allowed indicator list. The allowed indicators are limited to price action, moving averages, momentum oscillators (RSI, MACD, Stochastic, ADX), volatility measures (ATR, Bollinger Bands, HV), and volume ratios based on equity trading volume only. Put/call ratio calculation requires options order flow data that is not supported.
translation_notes: This signal is based on options market sentiment (put/call ratio) which requires external data sources not present in standard OHLCV or technical indicator feeds. To implement this signal, the backtest engine would need to integrate options market microstructure data with custom indicators for put_call_ratio_open_buy calculation.
